scripts.local:logs: bash -lc 'docker compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.local.yml logs --tail=${TAIL_LINES:-200} openclaw-gateway'
scripts.local:test:gmail:read: bash -lc 'docker compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.local.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway gog gmail search "newer_than:1d" --account automation@example.com --plain'
scripts.cloud:restart: bash -lc 'test -n "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME" && bash ./scripts/cloud-ssh-app.sh env OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app OPENCLAW_DEPLOY_ROOT=/opt/openclaw bash ./scripts/runtime-lifecycle.sh cloud restart "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME"'
scripts.cloud:rebuild: bash -lc 'test -n "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME" && bash ./scripts/sync-cloud-app.sh "$VM_NAME" "$PROJECT_ID" "$ZONE" && bash ./scripts/cloud-ssh-app.sh env OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app OPENCLAW_DEPLOY_ROOT=/opt/openclaw bash ./scripts/runtime-lifecycle.sh cloud rebuild "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME"'
scripts.cloud:logs: bash -lc 'TAIL="${TAIL_LINES:-200}" && bash ./scripts/cloud-ssh-app.sh docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml logs --tail="$TAIL" openclaw-gateway'
scripts.cloud:cron:apply: bash -lc 'bash ./scripts/cloud-ssh-app.sh env OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app bash ./scripts/runtime-cron.sh cloud apply "${CLOUD_CRON_FILE:-config/cron.cloud.json}"'
scripts.cloud:cron:run:digest: bash -lc 'bash ./scripts/cloud-ssh-app.sh env OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app bash ./scripts/runtime-cron.sh cloud run pip-newsletter-digest-morning'
scripts.cloud:test:gmail:read: bash ./scripts/cloud-ssh-app.sh docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway gog gmail search newer_than:1d --account automation@example.com --plain
scripts.cloud:test:gmail:send: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "sudo bash -lc '\''cd /opt/openclaw/app && docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway bash -lc '\''\''\''printf \"Cloud Gmail send test\\n\" | gog gmail send --account automation@example.com --to ${GMAIL_TEST_TO:-user@example.com} --subject \"${GMAIL_TEST_SUBJECT:-Pip Cloud Gmail send test}\" --body-file=-'\''\''\'''\''"'
